title: mering composite reflection between end members
output: Composite 00l reflections should migrate between the corresponding end-member reflections as composition changes.
diagnostic_implication: Composite 00l reflections should migrate between the corresponding end-member reflections as composition changes.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: mering broad when end member reflections separated
output: Large separation of component reflections predicts broad mixed-layer peaks.
diagnostic_implication: Large separation of component reflections predicts broad mixed-layer peaks.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.quote_fragment: peaks are broad if end-member reflections are widely separated

title: mering sharp when end member reflections close
output: Close juxtaposition of component reflections predicts relatively sharp peaks.
diagnostic_implication: Close juxtaposition of component reflections predicts relatively sharp peaks.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.quote_fragment: sharp peaks indicate the close juxtaposition

title: mering superstructure ordered
output: Superstructure reflections support ordered interstratification and help separate R1 from R0.
diagnostic_implication: Superstructure reflections support ordered interstratification and help separate R1 from R0.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.quote_fragment: convenient to designate their spacings as d(00l)*

title: mering irrationality randomness
output: An irrational basal series is evidence for randomness in interstratification.
diagnostic_implication: An irrational basal series is evidence for randomness in interstratification.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.quote_fragment: Irrationality is evidence of some randomness

title: ordering R0 no superstructure
output: Absence of superstructure components supports random R0 when other mixed-layer evidence exists.
diagnostic_implication: Absence of superstructure components supports random R0 when other mixed-layer evidence exists.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.quote_fragment: RO are simpler than those for R1

title: ordering R1 superstructure present
output: Superstructure reflections support R1 ordered interstratification.
diagnostic_implication: Superstructure reflections support R1 ordered interstratification.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: ordering IS low angle EG
output: Position of the 5-8.5 deg2theta reflection in EG-solvated I/S determines Reichweite.
diagnostic_implication: Position of the 5-8.5 deg2theta reflection in EG-solvated I/S determines Reichweite.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: ordering mica vermiculite high mica ambiguous
output: R0 versus R1 mica/vermiculite is difficult above about 80 percent mica.
diagnostic_implication: R0 versus R1 mica/vermiculite is difficult above about 80 percent mica.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.quote_fragment: difficult if the mica content is greater

title: superstructure corrensite 00l star
output: Rational d(00l)* series supports corrensite as R1 chlorite/smectite.
diagnostic_implication: Rational d(00l)* series supports corrensite as R1 chlorite/smectite.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: superstructure rectorite R1 50 50
output: K-rectorite is treated as R1 illite(0.5)/EG-smectite with superstructure behavior.
diagnostic_implication: K-rectorite is treated as R1 illite(0.5)/EG-smectite with superstructure behavior.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: superstructure mica vermiculite shoulder
output: A subtle high-angle shoulder can identify R1 mica/vermiculite at high mica content.
diagnostic_implication: A subtle high-angle shoulder can identify R1 mica/vermiculite at high mica content.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: behavior IS EG then heated confirmation
output: EG alteration gives provisional I/S; heating to 375C for 1 h confirms by illite-like collapse.
diagnostic_implication: EG alteration gives provisional I/S; heating to 375C for 1 h confirms by illite-like collapse.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.quote_fragment: Heating to 375C for 1 h provides confirmation

title: behavior CS EG expansion favors smectite component
output: Expansion with EG favors chlorite/smectite over chlorite/vermiculite.
diagnostic_implication: Expansion with EG favors chlorite/smectite over chlorite/vermiculite.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: behavior CS no EG ambiguous CV
output: If EG does not cause apparent expansion, C/S versus C/V remains indeterminate without additional evidence.
diagnostic_implication: If EG does not cause apparent expansion, C/S versus C/V remains indeterminate without additional evidence.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: behavior CV heated collapse to 10A
output: Heat collapse toward 10 A favors vermiculite-bearing interstratification over C/S.
diagnostic_implication: Heat collapse toward 10 A favors vermiculite-bearing interstratification over C/S.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: behavior corrensite dehydrated resolves mixture
output: Na-saturated dehydrated analysis can resolve corrensite/chlorite/smectite mixtures that EG or air-dried patterns cannot.
diagnostic_implication: Na-saturated dehydrated analysis can resolve corrensite/chlorite/smectite mixtures that EG or air-dried patterns cannot.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.quote_fragment: Little can be learned from EG and air-dried

title: behavior KS requires three treatments
output: Compare air-dried, EG and 375C patterns before rejecting K/S as kaolinite or halloysite.
diagnostic_implication: Compare air-dried, EG and 375C patterns before rejecting K/S as kaolinite or halloysite.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: behavior SC unaffected by solvation heating
output: Serpentine/chlorite is not diagnosed by solvation response; use odd/even peak broadening and equations.
diagnostic_implication: Serpentine/chlorite is not diagnosed by solvation response; use odd/even peak broadening and equations.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: behavior MV Mg glycerol proves vermiculite
output: Mg saturation plus glycerol with little change is proof of a vermiculite component in mica/vermiculite context.
diagnostic_implication: Mg saturation plus glycerol with little change is proof of a vermiculite component in mica/vermiculite context.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.quote_fragment: Proof of a vermiculite component requires

title: line broadening Q minor component
output: Q/line-broadening can identify small minor-component proportions that peak positions alone miss.
diagnostic_implication: Q/line-broadening can identify small minor-component proportions that peak positions alone miss.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: line broadening instrumental correction
output: High-order line breadth work must correct instrumental effects, especially CuKalpha doublet broadening.
diagnostic_implication: High-order line breadth work must correct instrumental effects, especially CuKalpha doublet broadening.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.quote_fragment: correct the experimental data for instrumental effects

title: line broadening not alone
output: Broad peaks alone are not sufficient because crystallite thickness and preparation can also broaden lines.
diagnostic_implication: Broad peaks alone are not sufficient because crystallite thickness and preparation can also broaden lines.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

title: line broadening SC odd even
output: Odd chlorite reflections broaden while even reflections remain relatively sharp in serpentine/chlorite.
diagnostic_implication: Odd chlorite reflections broaden while even reflections remain relatively sharp in serpentine/chlorite.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals

output: Estimate percent illite from Table 8.3, preferably using delta 2theta.
diagnostic_implication: Estimate percent illite from Table 8.3, preferably using delta 2theta.

diagnostic_implication: Systematic migration, irrational series and treatment-linked changes support interstratification.

title: mixture noise preserve ambiguity
output: Poor/noisy patterns from mixtures must remain ambiguous unless multi-treatment evidence is coherent.
diagnostic_implication: Poor/noisy patterns from mixtures must remain ambiguous unless multi-treatment evidence is coherent.

title: corrensite mixture dehydrated resolution
output: Dehydrated preparations can separate chlorite, smectite and corrensite better than EG/air-dried patterns.
diagnostic_implication: Dehydrated preparations can separate chlorite, smectite and corrensite better than EG/air-dried patterns.

output: Integrated areas in dehydrated patterns can support quantitative chlorite/smectite/corrensite mixture analysis with mineral intensity factors.
diagnostic_implication: Integrated areas in dehydrated patterns can support quantitative chlorite/smectite/corrensite mixture analysis with mineral intensity factors.

title: intensity preparation particle size limitation
output: Quantitative intensity analysis is suspect if preparation emphasizes finer particle sizes.
diagnostic_implication: Quantitative intensity analysis is suspect if preparation emphasizes finer particle sizes.
